piece.title: Still Cove
piece.notes: First successful Intervals Engine piece. Unexpectedly cinematic and techno-futuristic rather than pure ambient — emerged from instrument choices against the D Dorian MIDI skeleton. A keeper.

track_1_harmony.notes: Sawtooth OSC1 into resonant filter. Filter envelope gives unexpected techno pulse on the pedal bass. Do NOT fix — this is the sound. Pull cutoff down slightly if too aggressive.

track_2_melody.notes: Wavetable + Sample engine with morph. Long release. Vocal ahh sits deep in baritone. Perfect for harmony track — chords blur together beautifully with reverb tail.

track_3_bass.notes: Supersaw with detune + tape echo FX. Sparse melody notes with delay trailing off — ambient guitar shimmer. The tape echo delay should be synced to 68 BPM (882ms quarter note).

track_4_counterpoint.notes: Three oscillators, unison on, long attack/release, noise in mixer. Slow attack swells in underneath. Track 4 is a duplicate of harmony track routed to Moog for pad wash in low-mid bed.
